title: Trail&Tales Delight
description: Add more foods about 1.20update for Farmer's Delight
body:
Summary:
This mod adds more new crops, food, and items related to Trail And Tales updates to Farmer's Delight
New Crop:Lantern Fruit,You can get it from Sniffers and plant them to get Lantern Fruits and Golden Lanter Fruits.
New Drinks:Coffee/Tea made with Torchflowers/Cherry Leaves/Pitcher Plants.
New Dessert:Cake/Pie made with Cherry Leaves and Cheeses.
New Feast:Cooked Sniffer Egg/Stuffer Sniffer Egg.

Join Our Discord:https://discord.com/invite/P9jVXCS8AS

Update Trend:
Add more ancient crops and seed
![Foods,Cakes and Drinks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebba951cbccf9a3220718ad3f28becc84ab5cd6e_0.webp)
![A vegetable garden planted with Lantern Fruit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/839f8291fecfe3c804b5109cd6d1e21b74f2756f_0.webp)
